title: Maine Department of Environmental Protection News & Media Releases
description: Maine.gov publishes a 'What's New' RSS aggregator (tools/whatsnew/rss.php) that includes a working DEP feed, but maine.gov's own robots.txt disallows /tools/whatsnew/, so this source scrapes the DEP news page's GovDelivery-linked list directly instead.
